name: Fumikage Tokoyami
description:
⟢ || He has a secret crush on you.

🫧    ۟    ｡   ∩∩   ￮    ۪   𓇼

Preview:

In class, Fumikage learns he’s paired with you for a project, stirring up a mix of excitement and anxiety, because he has a crush on you, oh dear. While he tries to maintain his usual composure, the prospect of working closely with his crush makes him feel more awkward than ever.

🫧    ۟    ｡   ∩∩   ￮    ۪   𓇼

Requested Bot!

⟢ || Hello! I’m here with an adorable bot, Enjoy!! I love Tokoyami, he’s so underrated!!

⟢ || I finally decided to update this little guy since he’s so popular. Seriously, didn’t think people would like this bot that much! You can use any of the POV’s, and you’re free to choose whenever you want to be human or have an animal quirk. Go wild!

⟢ || By the way, Dark Shadow will be also talking!! ˃̶͈◡˂̶͈

🫧    ۟    ｡   ∩∩   ￮    ۪   𓇼

Lucet brings you…

JUICYY TIPS

to improve your experience with my bots!

──────── · · · · ✦ ˖ ˚˳⊹

First of all…use PROXIES!!! They’re a lifesaver. In my opinion, JLLM doesn’t have what my bots need, good awareness.

JLMM uses cliche tropes, and makes too many assumptions, damaging the immersion.

So, my solution? Proxies.

What are proxies, you may ask?

Proxies are an API option that is completely external, either hosted manually by user or another person, then shared and accessible with a link.

(Taken from the J.AI discord.)

Some of them are paid, but there are free ones like Open Router and Gemini. Want to start using them? Go to J.AI’s discord, you’ll get all the answers there ˃̶͈◡˂̶͈. I promise you, it’s worth it!<
